BACK

We commemorate H.E. Mr. Shinzo ABE, the former Prime Minister of Japan

We commemorate H.E. Mr. Shinzo ABE, the former Prime Minister of Japan, who contributed greatly to the establishment of Turkish-Japanese Science and Technology University, with respect and gratitude to the anniversary of his passing.

トルコ・日本科学技術大学の創設に多大なご尽力をいただいた故安倍晋三元首相に敬意及び感謝の気持ちを込めて、ご命日にあたり心からご冥福をお祈りいたします。
